exhibits_walked.name: Franchise Agreement
exhibits_walked.note: Full clause walk performed via Item 17 summary table cross-referenced with franchise agreement text. Key operative clauses captured in RT_depth_contract_burdens.json.

exhibits_walked.name: Multi-State Addendum
exhibits_walked.note: Full state-by-state override extraction performed. Captured in RT_depth_state_addenda_promotion.json.

key_clauses.obligation: Franchisee releases all past/present claims upon signing
Convert/migrate existing managed services clients to TLI within 90 days
CFF waived on average existing Gross Sales for first 12 months (calculated from prior 36 months or actual if <36 months)
Franchisor consents to transfer to approved buyer
Mutual release of all claims (known and unknown) subject to post-termination obligations
Franchisee waives CA Civil Code 1542 rights (release extends to unknown claims)

exhibits_walked.name: SBA Addendum
exhibits_walked.deferred_reason: SBA Addendum is a standard form required only if SBA financing is obtained. Not applicable to all franchisees. Core economic terms unchanged.
exhibits_walked.already_recovered: Item 10 states no financing offered. SBA addendum referenced in Item 10 and Exhibit J cover page.
exhibits_walked.what_remains_missing: Detailed SBA addendum operative clauses (standard SBA form provisions). Low materiality for franchise economics.
